name: Norma Core
summary: A portable hybrid wiki contract for LLM-active memory, ingest discipline, and careful knowledge-base mutation.
description: Norma Core combines a durable wiki control plane with an execution layer for ambiguity control, minimal edits, and verified outcomes. It supports active-memory retrieval through wiki/hot.md, canonical index/log discipline, immutable raw sources, and reusable ingest workflows.
